mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS applyId, v.id AS visitId, a.subject AS title, a.status AS status, a.start_time AS startTime, COALESCE(p.photo_count, 0) AS photoCount FROM eh_apply a LEFT JOIN eh_visit_record v ON v.apply_id = a.id AND v.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT visit_id, COUNT(*) AS photo_count FROM eh_visit_photo WHERE del_flag = '0' GROUP BY visit_id ) p ON p.visit_id = v.id WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.status IN ('2', '5') ORDER BY a.start_time DESC
